title: VIP Guest Arrival Playbook for Hotels in Egypt
trigger: Notification of VIP guest arrival received via PMS or OTA

steps.title: Pre-Arrival Preparation
steps.action: Verify VIP guest details in the PMS, including preferences and special requests. Coordinate with housekeeping to ensure the room is prepared to VIP standards.

steps.title: Welcome Arrangement
steps.action: Arrange for a personalized welcome note and complimentary amenities in the room. Ensure F&B has prepared any requested items.

steps.title: Arrival Notification
steps.action: Notify the concierge and front desk team of the VIP guest's expected arrival time. Ensure all staff are briefed on the guest's profile.

steps.title: VIP Check-In Process
steps.action: Greet the VIP guest upon arrival. Offer express check-in and escort the guest to their room. Provide a brief overview of hotel facilities and services.

steps.title: Post-Arrival Follow-Up
steps.action: Contact the guest within an hour of arrival to ensure satisfaction with the room and amenities. Address any immediate concerns.

steps.title: VIP Stay Enhancement
steps.action: Offer personalized services or experiences based on guest preferences, such as spa appointments or dining reservations.

steps.title: Issue Resolution
steps.action: Address any guest concerns promptly. Coordinate with relevant departments to resolve issues and follow up with the guest.

description: This playbook outlines the step-by-step process for managing the arrival of VIP guests in hotels, ensuring a seamless and personalized experience. It includes preparation, arrival, and follow-up actions tailored to the Egyptian hospitality context.
escalation_path: Contact the General Manager if VIP guest issues are unresolved after initial intervention.
